reference: Could you start with telling me what brought you in today? OK, when did these symptoms start? Um, like I've been feeling pretty tired for like a week, but like this bad for like maybe four days. OK, um and so it sounds like you haven't been going to work or like anything like that because you have been so kind of tired and weak. Yeah, I mean at first I was already kind of working. I'm I'm a truck driver so you know, once you start the job, you kind of have to finish that. I was supposed to go on another another trip like 4 days ago and I just couldn't. I had to call my boss and say that I can't. OK, um have you had any like specific muscle weakness like in your legs or or in your arms? Or would you say it's overall like a general weakness? It's just everywhere. It's it's not like I can't move. I'm just really, really tired. OK, and how, how have you been sleeping? I mean, I've just been sleeping like all the time. I have been sleeping all night and then like I said, I get up and I go to the couch and like just fall back asleep. OK, uh, have you been having any other symptoms? I mean my my throat is maybe a little sore, but nothing nothing else. OK, uh, when when did the sore throat first start? Probably probably about a week ago. Uh, I mean maybe a little bit. OK, like with uh, like solid foods or liquids or both? It it's just like it's just like it's a little a little tender. I mean, I live. I live alone so I can't really ask someone else if I have. OK, but your voice sounds the same to you? Yeah, I think so. Alright, um, and so have you been having any fevers or chills? Um, I've been, I've been feeling really cold. OK, have you had any, uh, like shakes or or rigors? I've been like kind of kind of shivering. OK, how about any night sweats? Um, yeah, come to think of it, like I was I was, when I was last traveling with, when I was last on it because I'm a truck driver, I I was in the States, I I had to bring something to Ohio, and I had to change my clothes in the night. Uh not like I've been feeling really tired, but it's not been like I don't think it's been like fainting. OK, so kind of like you are fatigued that you've been experiencing. I mean, we've all like you know, caught colds and you know stuff like bugs and stuff but, not not quite like this, like I can barely get up. Uh, no, uh, like I have I have a friend that I see and we both, um, we both lost our spouses, um, several years ago, and I mean, we, we see each other and like we live in the same apartment building and often have meals together. But we're just like friends. OK. But that's the person that would check on me if I needed it. OK, that's great. It sounds like you have some good support nearby. I'm sorry to hear about your wife.
